cost.human_maintenance: provenance marker + reveal disclosure a11y + a11y_content_audit tool + browser test + verifier + adversarial review

value.stage: S7 UI/UX Motion & Performance (P04 evidence/hierarchy/a11y polish)
value.acceptance: PASS (verifier re-derives; every interactive handler is a native named button/link + 44px + focus-visible + reveal moves focus into revealed content; the generated lesson carries a 推断 provenance marker distinct from the 原文 evidence link; reduced-motion disables animation but restores the .fr/.bw content -- no function lost)
value.user_value: a reader no longer mistakes the auto-generated lesson for the original source (讲义·推断 marker), keyboard/screen-reader users can complete the recall flow (focus moves into revealed answers), and motion-sensitive users keep all content -- making the professional info clearer + more operable without changing the design
value.realized_on_deploy: the polish is source-complete; the six-theme identity is byte-identical, so deploy is low-risk

unknown_not_zero: real screen-reader + real prefers-reduced-motion device testing is UNKNOWN until deployed/tested on real AT; the in-app-browser proof covers focus behavior + CSSOM rules but not a live screen reader.
